problem id: 32e5fe87
category: bit_manipulation

rule: I AND SHR(7)

examples:
  01101001 -> 00000000
  11010111 -> 00000001
  01010101 -> 00000000
  10110100 -> 00000000
  00100011 -> 00000000
  11001011 -> 00000001
  01100001 -> 00000000
  00011000 -> 00000000
  11111100 -> 00000000

query: 01001011
predicted answer: 00000000
